name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Configuration Change
notes: This Building Block defines events related to configuration events on virtual machines.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Configuration Change on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Configure Activity Attempted, Audit.Configure Activity Succeeded, Audit.Virtual Machine Update Attempt, Audit.Virtual Machine Update Success
when the event matches Machine Identifier (custom) is not N/A
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Configuration Change on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Configure Activity Attempted, Audit.Configure Activity Succeeded, Audit.Virtual Machine Update Attempt, Audit.Virtual Machine Update Success
AND when the event matches Machine Identifier (custom) is not N/A
